description: Execution dependency graph. Each wave runs serially; agents within a wave run in parallel.

waves.label: Foundation
waves.notes: No dependencies. exchange-rates must complete before any EUR cost agent.

waves.label: Core Costs
waves.notes: All depend on exchange-rates (wave 0). Run in parallel within this wave.

waves.label: Qualitative Data
waves.notes: No data dependencies on waves 0-1. Grouped here for logical sequencing.

waves.label: Post-Processing
waves.notes: Reads all updated location.json files and recomputes monthlyCostUSD totals.

criticalNote: If exchange-rates fails, all wave 1 EUR agents must be skipped or run with stale rate warning.
